description: Currently the layout is: Note -> 'Want to visit?' CTA + button. Should be: 'Want to visit?' CTA + button -> Note. Just swap the vertical order so the CTA is the primary attention-grabber and the note sits beneath it as supporting content. Scope: locate the section (likely on the campus or visit-related page) and reorder the two blocks in markup. Verify on both mobile and desktop that spacing/padding still reads correctly after the swap. Acceptance: 'Want to visit?' heading + button appear above the note block; visual hierarchy reads CTA-first; spacing intact at all breakpoints.
title: Flip order: 'Want to visit?' button should appear above the note, not below
